英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾
zh.Raans, Bucks., England: 英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾
zh.lifeSummary: William Brudenell III是Richard Brudenell的兒子，於1361年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安。他於大約1374年與Agnes Grove在英國巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安。

zh-hans.Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England: 英国巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安
英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾
zh-hans.Raans, Bucks., England: 英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: William Brudenell III是Richard Brudenell的儿子，于1361年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安。他于大约1374年与Agnes Grove在英国巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世在他的家乡，埋葬在英国巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安。

nameMeanings.name: Brudenell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: ethnic name from Old Norman French Bretonnel, a diminutive of Bret ‘Breton’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: William Brudenell III was born in 1361, in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England as the son of Richard Brudenell. He married Agnes Grove about 1374, in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died in his hometown, and was buried in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: William Brudenell III est né en 1361, à Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, fils de Richard Brudenell. Il a épousé Agnes Grove environ 1374, à Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: William Brudenell III wurde 1361 in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England, als Sohn von Richard Brudenell geboren. Er hat um 1374 in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England Agnes Grove geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: William Brudenell III è nato il nel 1361 nel Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England come figlio di Richard Brudenell. Lui sposato Agnes Grove circa 1374, nel Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England.

ja.Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England: イギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイメルシャム
イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイア

ja.Raans, Bucks., England: イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイア
ja.of Raans, Bucks, England: イギリスブクインガムシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: William Brudenell IIIは1361年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイメルシャムでRichard Brudenellの息子として生まれた。約1374年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイメルシャムでAgnes Groveと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は故郷で死去し，イギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイメルシャムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Brudenell III(은)는 1361년 영국 벅잉함실르 어머샤에서 Richard Brudenell의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1374년 영국 벅잉함실르 어머샤에서 Agnes Grove(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 벅잉함실르 어머샤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: William Brudenell III nasceu em 1361, em Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra filho de Richard Brudenell. Ele casou-se com Agnes Grove aproximadamente 1374, em Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: William Brudenell III родился в 1361 г. в местности амиршам, буккингхамшир, Англия. Его отца звали Richard Brudenell. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Grove около 1374 г. в местности амиршам, буккингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности амиршам, буккингхамшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: William Brudenell III nació en 1361, en Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra como hijo de Richard Brudenell. Se casó con Agnes Grove aproximadamente 1374, en Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.
